description: Filter value listing emitted by edgp failure-examples --list-codes for committed validation failure examples.

exampleCount.description: Number of failure examples represented by the listed filter values.

contracts.description: Documented schema contracts available after any requested filters are applied.

schema.description: Validation failure example filter listing schema identifier.

sourceSchema.description: Source index schema used to build this filter listing.

targetTypes.description: Target artifact types available after any requested filters are applied.

validationFailureCodes.description: Validation failure codes available after any requested filters are applied.

verificationFailureCodes.description: Bundle verifier failure codes available after any requested filters are applied.

title: EDGP Validation Failure Example Filters v1
